high-voltage.cable.systems.title: High-Voltage Cable Systems
high-voltage.cable.systems.description: High-voltage cable systems for power transmission, using XLPE insulation up to 500 kV, with key components and applications.

xlpe.insulation.title: XLPE Insulation
xlpe.insulation.description: Cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE) insulation is a key component in modern high-voltage cable systems, enabling reliable power transmission at voltages up to 500 kV.

copper.conductor.title: Copper conductor
copper.conductor.description: A copper conductor is the metallic core of a high-voltage cable, typically used in XLPE-insulated cable systems for power transmission.

aluminium.conductor.title: Aluminium Conductor
aluminium.conductor.description: An aluminium conductor is a core component of high-voltage cable systems, used for power transmission in applications such as underground urban networks, submarine crossings, and offshore wind farm connections. It is typically surrounded by semi-conductive screens, XLPE insulation, metallic sheaths, and outer protective jackets.

semi-conductive.screen.title: semi-conductive.screen
semi-conductive.screen.description: A semi-conductive layer applied over the conductor in high-voltage cables to ensure a smooth equipotential surface and prevent partial discharges.

metallic.sheath.title: Metallic Sheath
metallic.sheath.description: A continuous metallic barrier in high-voltage cable systems that surrounds the XLPE insulation to block water ingress and provide mechanical protection.

outer.protective.jacket.title: outer.protective.jacket
outer.protective.jacket.description: The outermost layer of a high-voltage cable, providing protection against environmental and mechanical damage.

underground.urban.networks.title: Underground Urban Networks
underground.urban.networks.description: High-voltage cable systems deployed in urban underground networks for power transmission, using XLPE-insulated cables with careful installation handling.

submarine.crossings.title: Submarine Crossings
submarine.crossings.description: Submarine crossings are high-voltage cable systems deployed underwater for power transmission, using XLPE insulation and specialized installation techniques.

offshore.wind.farm.connections.title: Offshore Wind Farm Connections
offshore.wind.farm.connections.description: High-voltage cable systems used to transmit power from offshore wind farms to onshore grids.

bending.radii.title: Bending radii
bending.radii.description: Bending radii refer to the minimum allowable curvature of a high-voltage cable during installation, critical for preventing damage to cable components.

installation.minimum.bending.radius.title: Installation Minimum Bending Radius
installation.minimum.bending.radius.description: The smallest radius a high‑voltage cable may be bent during installation, typically specified as a multiple of the cable outer diameter.

installation.maximum.pulling.tension.title: Installation maximum pulling tension
installation.maximum.pulling.tension.description: Maximum tensile force allowed on a high-voltage cable conductor during pulling, set at 50 N/mm².

installation.temperature.title: Installation Temperature
installation.temperature.description: Minimum ambient temperature permitted during cable installation to prevent damage to insulation and sheathing materials.

installation.duct.installation.title: Installazione in condotto (Duct Installation)
installation.duct.installation.description: Procedura per l'installazione di cavi elettrici ad alta tensione all'interno di condotti, con requisiti di raggio di curvatura, trazione, temperatura e lubrificazione.

installation.cable.lubricant.title: Installation cable lubricant
installation.cable.lubricant.description: Lubricant applied to cables during duct installation to reduce friction and protect the outer sheath.

installation.cable.winch.title: Cable Winch
installation.cable.winch.description: A cable winch is a mechanical device used to pull high-voltage cables during installation, typically equipped with tension monitoring to ensure pulling forces remain within safe limits.

installation.direct.burial.title: Installation Direct Burial
installation.direct.burial.description: Procedure for installing high-voltage cables directly in the ground, including trench dimensions, bedding, pulling, and jointing requirements.

installation.trench.depth.title: installation.trench.depth
installation.trench.depth.description: Minimum trench depths for direct burial of high-voltage cables: 800 mm in urban areas and 1200 mm in rural areas.

installation.sand.bedding.title: installation.sand.bedding
installation.sand.bedding.description: Sand bedding layer for direct burial cable installations, specified as 100 mm below and above the cable.

installation.warning.tape.title: Installation warning tape
installation.warning.tape.description: A brightly colored tape buried above high-voltage cables to warn excavators of their presence.

installation.jointing.title: Installation Jointing
installation.jointing.description: Installation practices for splicing high voltage cables (jointing) as per the cable installation guide, including environmental control, joint types, and bay dimensions.

installation.prefabricated.joints.title: installation.prefabricated.joints
installation.prefabricated.joints.description: Factory‑made, cold‑shrink or slip‑on accessories used to splice high‑voltage cable sections. They are preferred because they reduce on‑site work, minimise contamination risk and allow fast, repeatable installation.

installation.joint.bay.dimensions.title: Installation Joint Bay Dimensions
installation.joint.bay.dimensions.description: Minimum spatial requirements for joint bays used in high-voltage cable installation, as specified in installation guidelines.

iec.61936-1.title: IEC 61936-1
iec.61936-1.description: International standard for safety requirements of power installations exceeding 1 kV a.c., covering design, erection, operation, and maintenance of HV cable systems.

local.electrical.safety.regulations.title: local.electrical.safety.regulations
local.electrical.safety.regulations.description: Statutory requirements for electrical safety in HV cable work, specific to a jurisdiction.

company.specific.safety.procedures.title: Company-specific safety procedures
company.specific.safety.procedures.description: Company-specific safety procedures are internal protocols that supplement statutory and international standards for high-voltage cable work. They form part of the regulatory framework that all HV cable operations must follow.

cable.isolation.and.earthing.title: Cable Isolation and Earthing
cable.isolation.and.earthing.description: Procedures and safety requirements for isolating and earthing high-voltage cables before work, ensuring compliance with standards and preventing electrical hazards.

voltage.absence.verification.title: Voltage Absence Verification
voltage.absence.verification.description: The process of confirming that a high-voltage cable is de-energized before work begins, as required by safety standards.

safety.locks.and.tags.title: safety.locks.and.tags
safety.locks.and.tags.description: A mandatory safety procedure involving locks and tags to prevent accidental re-energization during high-voltage cable work.

safe.work.zone.with.barriers.title: Safe work zone with barriers
safe.work.zone.with.barriers.description: A safe work zone with barriers is a designated, physically demarcated area established before any work on high-voltage (HV) cable systems to protect personnel from accidental contact with live parts and to control access. It is the fourth step in the standard safe working procedure for HV cable work, following isolation, earthing, voltage verification, and application of locks and tags.

exclusion.zone.for.cable.fault.title: exclusion.zone.for.cable.fault
exclusion.zone.for.cable.fault.description: Safety perimeter around a suspected HV cable fault location, typically 3 m, to protect personnel from re-energization risks.

fault.re-energization.prohibition.title: Proibizione di ri-energizzazione in caso di guasto del cavo
fault.re-energization.prohibition.description: La proibizione di ri-energizzazione in caso di guasto del cavo è una procedura di sicurezza critica per i sistemi di cavi ad alta tensione (HV). Impedisce la ri-energizzazione di un cavo dopo un guasto fino a quando non siano state completate ispezioni e valutazioni di sicurezza adeguate, al fine di prevenire rischi elettrici, danni alle apparecchiature e potenziali lesioni al personale.

control.centre.reporting.title: control.centre.reporting
control.centre.reporting.description: A mandatory safety procedure requiring immediate notification of the control centre when a cable fault occurs during live HV cable operations.

approved.supplier.list.hv.cable.componen.title: approved.supplier.list.hv.cable.components
approved.supplier.list.hv.cable.componen.description: List of approved suppliers for high‑voltage cable components, covering conductors, insulation compounds, sheathing materials, and accessories.

norsk.hydro.aluminium.rod.title: Norsk Hydro aluminium rod
norsk.hydro.aluminium.rod.description: Aluminium rod supplied by Norsk Hydro for use as conductor in high-voltage cables, certified to IEC 60228.

aurubis.ag.copper.rod.title: Aurubis AG Copper Rod
aurubis.ag.copper.rod.description: Aurubis AG is an approved supplier of oxygen-free copper rod for high-voltage cable conductors, certified to EN 13601.

borealis.visico.le4253.xlpe.compound.title: Borealis Visico LE4253 XLPE Compound
borealis.visico.le4253.xlpe.compound.description: A peroxide-crosslinkable XLPE insulation compound approved for use in high-voltage cable systems, manufactured by Borealis.

dow.chemical.hfda-4202.ec.xlpe.compound.title: Dow Chemical HFDA-4202 EC XLPE Compound
dow.chemical.hfda-4202.ec.xlpe.compound.description: An extra-clean, peroxide-crosslinkable XLPE compound manufactured by Dow Chemical, approved for use as insulation in high-voltage cable systems.

exxonmobil.hdpe.compound.moisture.barrie.title: ExxonMobil HDPE Compound for Moisture Barrier
exxonmobil.hdpe.compound.moisture.barrie.description: High-density polyethylene (HDPE) compound supplied by ExxonMobil, approved for use as a radial moisture barrier in high-voltage cable systems. It is listed among approved sheathing materials for HV cable components.

arkema.aluminium.pe.laminate.tape.title: Arkema aluminium-PE laminate tape
arkema.aluminium.pe.laminate.tape.description: An approved supplier component for high-voltage cable sheathing, consisting of an aluminium-polyethylene laminate tape used as a radial moisture barrier.

prysmian.pre-moulded.joints.terminations.title: Prysmian Pre‑moulded Joints and Terminations
prysmian.pre-moulded.joints.terminations.description: Pre‑moulded joints and terminations manufactured by Prysmian, approved for high‑voltage cable systems and IEC type‑tested.

nkt.cold-shrink.joints.66-170.kv.title: nkt.cold-shrink.joints.66-170.kv
nkt.cold-shrink.joints.66-170.kv.description: NKT cold-shrink joints for 66–170 kV voltage range, listed as approved accessories for high-voltage cable systems.

iec.62067.title: IEC 62067
iec.62067.description: International standard for testing power cable systems with extruded insulation for rated voltages above 150 kV up to 500 kV

cable.testing.type_testing.title: Type Testing
cable.testing.type_testing.description: Type testing per IEC 62067 validates the design of a high-voltage cable system through a series of electrical, mechanical, and thermal tests to ensure it meets performance and safety requirements.

cable.testing.routine_testing.title: Routine Testing
cable.testing.routine_testing.description: Manufacturing-stage tests performed on every cable length, including high-voltage withstand, partial discharge, and conductor resistance checks.

cable.testing.after_installation_testing.title: After-Installation Testing
cable.testing.after_installation_testing.description: On-site commissioning tests performed after cable installation to verify system integrity.

cable.testing.high_voltage_withstand_tes.title: High-Voltage Withstand Test (cable.testing.high_voltage_withstand_test)
cable.testing.high_voltage_withstand_tes.description: A high-voltage withstand test applied to cable systems to verify insulation integrity; performed at factory (routine), during type approval, and after installation.

cable.testing.partial_discharge_measurem.title: Partial discharge measurement
cable.testing.partial_discharge_measurem.description: Partial discharge measurement is a non-destructive diagnostic test used to detect localized dielectric breakdowns in high-voltage cable insulation. It is a mandatory routine test per IEC 62067, with a threshold of <5 pC, and is also part of type testing for design validation.

cable.testing.conductor_resistance_check.title: Conductor Resistance Check
cable.testing.conductor_resistance_check.description: A routine test performed on every manufactured cable length to verify that the DC resistance of the conductor meets the specified value, ensuring correct material and cross-section and detecting manufacturing defects.

cable.testing.dc_vlf_withstand_testing.title: DC VLF Withstand Testing
cable.testing.dc_vlf_withstand_testing.description: DC VLF withstand testing is an on-site commissioning test for high-voltage cables, performed after installation to verify insulation integrity. It is part of after-installation testing per IEC 62067 and related standards.

cable.testing.sheath_integrity_test.title: Sheath integrity test
cable.testing.sheath_integrity_test.description: An after-installation commissioning test that verifies the continuity and insulation condition of the metallic sheath and outer jacket of a high-voltage cable by applying 10 kV DC for 1 minute.

cable.testing.joint_resistance_measureme.title: cable.testing.joint_resistance_measurement
cable.testing.joint_resistance_measureme.description: An on-site commissioning test that measures the DC resistance of cable joints to verify low and stable contact resistance after installation.

water.treeing.title: Water treeing
water.treeing.description: Water treeing is a degradation mechanism in XLPE insulation, mitigated by super-clean compounds and antioxidants.

electrical.treeing.title: Electrical Treeing
electrical.treeing.description: Electrical treeing is a primary aging mechanism in XLPE insulation for high-voltage cable systems, mitigated by modern super-clean compounds with antioxidant packages.

triple.extrusion.process.title: Triple extrusion process
triple.extrusion.process.description: The triple extrusion process is a manufacturing technique for [[xlpe.insulation]] in [[high-voltage.cable.systems]], where three layers—[[semi-conductive.screen]] (conductor screen), [[xlpe.insulation]], and [[semi-conductive.screen]] (insulation screen)—are extruded simultaneously in a single pass. This method eliminates interfaces between layers, reducing defects and improving dielectric performance.

peroxide.crosslinking.title: peroxide.crosslinking
peroxide.crosslinking.description: Peroxide crosslinking is a chemical process used to produce cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE) insulation for high-voltage cables.

super.clean.xlpe.compound.title: super.clean.xlpe.compound
super.clean.xlpe.compound.description: Super-clean XLPE compound is a high-purity cross-linked polyethylene insulation material used in high-voltage cable systems (66 kV and above), offering high dielectric strength, low loss, and long service life.

antioxidant.package.title: Antioxidant package
antioxidant.package.description: Additive formulations used in XLPE insulation for high-voltage cables to enhance longevity and resistance to degradation.

default.cluster.l1.hv-cable-safety-proce.title: HV Cable Safety Procedures Framework
default.cluster.l1.hv-cable-safety-proce.description: All safety procedures, from statutory regulations to emergency protocols, required for personnel protection during high-voltage cable work, including isolation, verification, and fault response.

default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-sy.title: High-Voltage Cable Systems: Design, Materials, Installation, and Testing
default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-sy.description: This cluster covers the complete lifecycle of high-voltage cable systems, from materials and manufacturing to installation, testing, and degradation mechanisms, centered on XLPE-insulated cables for power transmission up to 500 kV.

default.home.title: High-Voltage Cable Engineering Knowledge Base
default.home.description: A comprehensive knowledge base covering high-voltage cable engineering, including design, materials, installation, testing, and mandatory safety procedures for personnel protection.

cluster_summaries.default.cluster.l1.hv-cable-safety-proce: All safety procedures, from statutory regulations to emergency protocols, required for personnel protection during high-voltage cable work, including isolation, verification, and fault response.
cluster_summaries.default.cluster.l1.high-voltage-cable-sy: This cluster covers the complete lifecycle of high-voltage cable systems, from materials and manufacturing to installation, testing, and degradation mechanisms, centered on XLPE-insulated cables for power transmission up to 500 kV.
cluster_summaries.default.home: A comprehensive knowledge base covering high-voltage cable engineering, including design, materials, installation, testing, and mandatory safety procedures for personnel protection.
